name: artificial_potential_fields
description: Treats planets as attractive/repulsive potentials; fleets flow along gradient descent.

name: distributed_pid_controllers
description: Each fleet controlled by an independent PID loop targeting planet delta-ships.

name: lyapunov_defense_heuristic
description: Certifies stability of a fleet allocation via Lyapunov energy functions.

name: kinematic_wave_theory
description: Models fleet traffic as kinematic shock waves propagating through the galaxy.

name: reaction_diffusion_turing_patterns
description: Fleet allocation evolves via reaction-diffusion equations producing stable spatial patterns.

name: susceptible_infected_recovered_model
description: Planet ownership spreads like infection: susceptible neutrals, infected friendlies, recovered captured.

name: stigmergic_pheromone_routing
description: Fleets deposit virtual pheromones on successful paths; others follow the scent gradient.

name: minimax_fleet_allocation
description: Two-ply minimax over fleet allocation decisions, pruned by alpha-beta.

name: bayesian_wave_function_collapse
description: Treats uncertain game states as a quantum wave function; collapses to best allocation via Bayes.

name: graph_neural_network_value_estimator
description: Planet graph encoded by a GNN; value head scores each possible fleet dispatch.

name: deep_q_network_macro_strategist
description: Deep Q-Network trained on synthetic episodes to select macro strategic moves.

name: lstm_fleet_trajectory_forecaster
description: LSTM predicts opponent fleet trajectories; pre-empts captures with counter-launches.

name: target_classifier_fnn
description: Feedforward net classifies each planet as high/low priority target; ships flow to high.

name: cascading_classifier_regressor
description: Two-stage model: classifier filters candidates, regressor sizes the fleet dispatch.

name: predictive_kinematic_interceptor
description: Predicts orbital intercept points analytically; launches to arrive exactly when planet is capturable.

name: path_aware_lead_interceptor
description: Computes lead-angle intercept path around the sun for orbiting targets.

name: greedy_lead_interceptor
description: Greedy nearest-available fleet always dispatched to highest-value intercept target.

name: macroeconomic_gravity_model
description: Trade-gravity model: fleet flows proportional to planet GDP and inversely to orbital distance.

name: frontline_consolidation
description: Identifies contested frontier planets; concentrates force at the weakest point in the line.

name: comet_riding_ephemeris_exploitation
description: Exploits comet orbital ephemerides to predict lucrative short-window capture opportunities.

name: the_vulture
description: Waits for two opponents to battle; swoops in to capture depleted planets.

name: markowitz_portfolio_optimization
description: Applies Markowitz mean-variance portfolio theory: allocates ships to maximize expected production return per unit risk. 🏆 Won the arena.

name: coordinated_strike_interceptor
description: Coordinates multiple fleets to converge simultaneously on high-value targets.
